# testing/utility/mcp-server-introspection.utility

Reflection-based introspection of McpServer internals for test assertions.

## Functions

| Function                                                      | Description                                                                         |
| ------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [getRegisteredTools](functions/getRegisteredTools.md)         | Retrieves the internal registered tools map from an McpServer via reflection.       |
| [getRegisteredTool](functions/getRegisteredTool.md)           | Looks up a single registered tool by name from a tools record.                      |
| [getRegisteredToolNames](functions/getRegisteredToolNames.md) | Returns the names of all registered tools on an McpServer.                          |
| [getSchemaShape](functions/getSchemaShape.md)                 | Extracts the Zod schema shape from a tool's input schema definition.                |
| [getServerInfoValue](functions/getServerInfoValue.md)         | Reads a server info field (`name` or `version`) from the internal MCP server state. |
